particulars.description: Land lying to the east of ashmore lake road willenhall all the uncalled capital for the time being and all intellectual property rights and all other freehold and leasehold property now or in the future which the company may have or acquire any legal or beneficial interest. Any legal or beneficial interest in all or any securities. Stock in trade and plant. Book debts.
